# BI-260001: Sign-in entry on the public landing page

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260001
- Title: Implement sign-in entry on the public landing page
- Status: Done
- Persona/Actor: Prospective or returning Crystord user visiting the public site
- Value statement: For a returning user, deliver a sign-in entry on the landing page to achieve
  fast access to the SaaS application without navigating away first.
- Context: The public landing page at crystord.com is a static Astro site. The SaaS app lives at
  app.crystord.com. Users land on crystord.com and need to get into the app.
- Problem statement: Currently the landing page has a placeholder sign-in page (sign-in.astro) that
  only redirects. There is no actual sign-in form or API call.
- Expected outcome: A user can enter credentials on crystord.com and land in the SaaS app at
  app.crystord.com without an intermediate redirect page.
- Success metric(s): Successful sign-in from the landing page results in a redirect to
  app.crystord.com. Error states are handled inline.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Sign-in entry is visible on the landing page (index.astro or a dedicated component).
  - Credentials are submitted via API call to the SaaS auth endpoint.
  - Success → redirect to `app.crystord.com`.
  - Failure → inline error, no full page reload.
  - Sign-in destination is read from `PUBLIC_APP_SIGN_IN_URL`, not hardcoded.
  - The implementation must adhere to the visual guidelines and token system defined in `.github/project/branding.md`.
- Non-goals: Implementing the auth backend; implementing the SaaS app itself.
- Constraints: Landing page must remain fully static; no server runtime.
- Dependencies: SaaS app must expose an auth endpoint that accepts cross-origin requests from
  crystord.com.
- Risks/assumptions: CORS must be configured on the SaaS app auth endpoint. The exact API contract
  is not yet defined.
- Validation approach: Manual end-to-end test of sign-in flow from landing page to SaaS app.
- Priority score: High
- Target window: After SaaS auth endpoint is available
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260001.md
  - ADR: ADR-260001.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
